goal: Fix 4 bugs from TMX v2 migration (hit detection, furniture clipping, invisible labels, TMX data sync) and deliver 2 new features (canvas font labels, LimeZu UI status icons) for the game rendering engine.

risks: 1. renderer.ts is a 900+ line file touched by 4 of 6 items — concurrent edits would conflict. Mitigation: single project with strict task ordering.

2. LimeZu UI sprite sheet integration requires understanding the sprite sheet layout (grid offsets, frame counts) which the builder may misidentify from the PNG. Mitigation: provide sprite sheet layout info in task description and require visual verification.

3. TMX re-sync (bug 4) could shift tile coordinates that affect the other bug fixes (hit detection, label positioning). Mitigation: TMX sync runs FIRST so all subsequent fixes use correct coordinates.
over_engineering_flags: Scope is appropriate — 4 bugs are specific constant/logic fixes, 2 features are well-defined replacements. No architecture changes needed.
challenges.recommendation: Proceed as-is. Single project, ordered tasks, one builder.

projects.title: Fix rendering bugs and replace fonts/icons with LimeZu assets
projects.scope_summary: 6 ordered tasks in one project: (1) re-sync TMX tile data via parse-tmx.ts, (2) fix CHARACTER_HIT dimensions to account for SPRITE_SCALE, (3) fix CHARACTER_SITTING_OFFSET collision alignment, (4) fix NAME_LABEL positioning constants, (5) replace bitmap font with canvas ctx.font/ctx.fillText, (6) replace hand-drawn status/interaction icons with LimeZu UI_48x48.png sprite sheet.
